findings.title: Integer overflow in transaction fee calculation
findings.description: Multiplication of int amount_cents by int fee_basis_points can exceed INT_MAX

findings.title: Integer overflow in portfolio value accumulation
findings.description: Running int sum of net transaction values overflows when balance plus multiple large nets exceed INT_MAX

findings.title: Integer overflow in record buffer allocation
findings.description: User-controlled record_count and record_size used in multiplication for malloc size without validation

findings.title: Integer overflow in compound interest loop
findings.description: Iterative compounding causes int current to grow exponentially and overflow mid-loop

findings.title: Signed overflow in 16-bit hash computation
findings.description: int16_t hash accumulator overflows via multiply-and-add cycle with integer promotion and narrowing

findings.title: Integer overflow in amount scaling
findings.description: Multiplication of int amount by int numerator from user input can exceed INT_MAX
